product_overview: A premium bilingual portfolio website for senior graphic designer Ameen Haieck. It presents selected creative work, professional background, and contact options in a fully responsive single-page experience.
core_goals: Allow visitors to browse portfolio projects.
Deliver a responsive, polished portfolio experience across devices.

features.name: Global Navigation Header
features.description: A sticky navigation header that helps visitors move quickly between the main sections of the portfolio site in desktop and mobile views.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> Click the logo -> See the page scroll to the top of the site
Navigate to /en -> Click About in the navigation -> See the About section
Navigate to /en -> Click Skills in the navigation -> See the Skills section
Navigate to /en -> Click Portfolio in the navigation -> See the Portfolio section
Navigate to /en -> Click Experience in the navigation -> See the Experience section
Navigate to /en -> Click Partners in the navigation -> See the Partners section
Navigate to /en -> Click Contact in the navigation -> See the Contact section
Navigate to /en -> Open the mobile menu -> Select a section link -> See the page jump to that section

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: A locale toggle that switches the portfolio between English and Arabic while preserving the current page context.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> Click AR in the language switcher -> See the site content translated into Arabic with RTL layout
Navigate to /ar -> Click EN in the language switcher -> See the site content translated into English with LTR layout

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: The landing section that introduces Ameen Haieck with headline content and prominent calls to action.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> View the hero section content as it animates into view -> Click a call-to-action link in the hero -> See the linked destination section

features.name: About Section
features.description: A biography section that introduces the designer, background, and creative profile.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#about -> Scroll the page -> See the About section reveal with animated content

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: A section that presents the designer's skills and core competencies.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#skills -> Scroll the page -> See the Skills section reveal with animated content

features.name: Logo/Client Ticker
features.description: A scrolling marquee that showcases partner or client logos as social proof.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> View the scrolling logo marquee -> See partner/client logos move continuously across the page

features.name: Portfolio Gallery
features.description: A categorized portfolio grid that lets visitors browse project groups, expand lists, preview images, and open external project links.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#portfolio -> View the portfolio categories -> Expand a category to show more items -> Collapse the category to hide extra items
Navigate to /en#portfolio -> Click a portfolio image -> See the image open in a lightbox -> Move to the next image -> Move to the previous image -> Close the lightbox
Navigate to /en#portfolio -> Click a portfolio item with an external project link -> See the project open in a new tab

features.name: Experience & Impact Section
features.description: A timeline or impact section that summarizes professional experience and measurable achievements.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#experience -> Scroll the page -> See the Experience section reveal with animated content

features.name: Certifications Section
features.description: A section listing professional certifications and credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> Scroll to the certifications area -> See the certifications list reveal with animated content

features.name: Partners Section
features.description: A section that displays partner and client brands for credibility and social proof.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#partners -> Scroll the page -> See the Partners section reveal with animated content

features.name: Contact Section
features.description: A contact area that provides direct ways to reach Ameen through email, WhatsApp, and social profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /en#contact -> Click the email link -> See the mail client open with a prefilled email draft
Navigate to /en#contact -> Click the WhatsApp link -> See a WhatsApp chat open in a new tab
Navigate to /en#contact -> Click an Instagram, Behance, or LinkedIn icon -> See the corresponding profile open in a new tab

features.name: Footer
features.description: A site footer that provides closing navigation or informational links.
user_flows: Navigate to /en -> Scroll to the bottom of the page -> View the footer links and information

features.name: Custom Cursor & Site Background
features.description: A global decorative cursor and animated background that enhance the visual presentation of the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /en on desktop -> Move the mouse around the page -> See the custom cursor follow the pointer movement

routes.description: Root path, redirects to default locale (/en) via next-intl middleware
Single-page English portfolio site with all sections (Hero, About, Skills, Portfolio, Experience, Certifications, Partners, Contact)
Single-page Arabic (RTL) portfolio site, same sections as /en with translated content and RTL layout

features.name: Global Navigation Header
features.description: Sticky/glass header with in-page anchor links to sections, desktop and mobile (hamburger) nav
user_interactions: Click logo to scroll to top
Click nav links (About, Skills, Portfolio, Experience, Partners) to jump to section anchors
Click Contact button to jump to
Open/close mobile menu via hamburger button
Header background changes style on scroll

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Toggle site language/locale between English and Arabic, preserving current path
user_interactions: Click EN/AR toggle to switch locale and reload translated content with correct text direction (ltr/rtl)

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Landing hero with headline, intro copy, and call-to-action
user_interactions: View animated entrance content
Click any CTA links/buttons present

features.name: About Section
features.description: About/bio section describing the designer
user_interactions: Scroll into view to trigger reveal animation

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: Displays designer's skills/competencies
user_interactions: Scroll into view to trigger reveal animation

features.name: Logo/Client Ticker
features.description: Scrolling marquee of partner/client logos
user_interactions: Passive viewing of auto-scrolling marquee

features.name: Portfolio Gallery
features.description: Categorized portfolio grid (Brand Identity, Graphic Design, Other) with expandable lists and an image lightbox viewer
user_interactions: Click "View all/Show less" to expand/collapse extra items per category
Click a portfolio card image to open lightbox
Navigate next/previous slides inside lightbox
Close lightbox via close button, backdrop click, or Escape key
Click a portfolio card with an external href to navigate to external project link in new tab

features.name: Experience & Impact Section
features.description: Timeline or stats showcasing professional experience and measurable impact
user_interactions: Scroll into view to trigger reveal animation

features.name: Certifications Section
features.description: Lists professional certifications
user_interactions: Scroll into view to trigger reveal animation

features.name: Partners Section
features.description: Displays partner/client brands
user_interactions: Scroll into view to trigger reveal animation

features.name: Contact Section
features.description: Contact options via email, WhatsApp, and social links
user_interactions: Click email link to open mail client (mailto:)
Click WhatsApp link to open wa.me chat in new tab
Click social icons (Instagram, Behance, LinkedIn) to open profiles in new tab

features.name: Footer
features.description: Site footer with closing info/links
user_interactions: Click footer links if present

features.name: Custom Cursor & Site Background
features.description: Decorative custom cursor and animated background layer applied globally
user_interactions: Mouse movement drives custom cursor position (desktop only)

known_limitations.issue: Purely static/presentational site with no backend, forms, or authentication
known_limitations.impact: No API calls to test; testing scope is limited to navigation, i18n, responsiveness, animations, and accessibility
